inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman with long straight black hair and delicate face-framing caramel highlights, angular features with strong sculpted brows, dreamy ethereal expression with softly parted lips. She stands in a concrete parking garage under harsh fluorescent tubes, wearing an oversized black leather jacket draped off one shoulder paired with a high-waisted leather mini skirt. Half body waist up, reflected in the tinted window of a parked luxury sedan, her mirror image slightly ghosted. Shot on 35mm lens, environmental portrait, harsh midday sun streaming through the garage entrance casting sharp diagonal shadows across her flawless porcelain skin. Styled smoky eye makeup, glass-skin finish, editorial fashion lookbook aesthetic. No text, no watermarks.
cropped legs, cropped feet, cropped shoes, text, watermark, logo
